hooks.rewakeMessage: Stop-hook cargo verification failed. Fix the issues below before ending the turn.
hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$' || exit 0; failed=0; echo '=== cargo fmt ==='; cargo fmt --all || failed=1; echo '=== cargo clippy ==='; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings || failed=1; echo '=== cargo test ==='; cargo test --workspace || failed=1; exit $((failed * 2))
